title: Deitrus
description:
Conquer complex and comical fast-paced grid-based combat as Wren and Chloe, an unlikely duo about to discover just how much they don't know about the world of Deitrus. An Hour Long Action RPG with a Non-Linear Narrative.

Fast-Paced Grid-Based Action
Duke it out in a unique and deep combat system unlike any other. Dodge enemy's blows and respond in kind with one of your character's signature moves. From slicing swords to electric orbs, there's many play styles to choose from.

An Island of Mystery
Explore the furthest reaches of the island of Deitrus, from the crimson Forest of Fire to the dark caverns of tvCave... and perhaps more.

Masterful Sound
A full soundtrack that brings atmosphere and emotion to the various locales, story beats, and moments of heart pounding tension!
description_short: Conquer complex and comical fast-paced grid-based combat as Wren and Chloe, an unlikely duo about to discover just how much they don't know about the world of Deitrus. An Hour Long Action RPG with a Non-Linear Narrative.
